title: schlechteranthus inclusus
intro: Schlechteranthus inclusus, a rare and lesser-known succulent plant native to Africa, is also known as the 'Kalahari crassula'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Schlechteranthus inclusus are largely anecdotal, but some studies suggest that it may have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which could aid in the prevention of infections and promotion of overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
